creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

(2014/05/06 0:11), Kurt Jaeger wrote:
> Hi!
>
> Some issue, as pointed out by Thomas.Gellekum@gmx.de:
>
>>>    - add runtime dependency to devel/git
>
>> This will not install if git-subversion is installed. Could you check
>> for ${PREFIX}/bin/git instead?
>
> So, we need a fix for this. I'm busy for the rest of this week 8-(

Attached patch adds OPTION to use devel/git-subversion instead of 
devel/git as backend. Please try and commit it if it is fit.

Best Regards.
